creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Doing:

mdconfig -s1g
mdconfig -s1g
zpool create meh md0 md1
zpool remove meh md0

Results in:

Unread portion of the kernel message buffer:

cpuid = 2
time = 1519336503

The panic is semi-immediate - the command succeeds, but panic happens in a few seconds afterwards.
